title: rcicrely: Toolkit for reliability analysis of classification images from reverse correlation studies in social psychology
description:
An R package for reliability assessment of classification images (CIs) produced by reverse correlation experiments. Covers within-condition consistency (permuted split-half with Spearman-Brown, leave-one-out, ICC) and between-condition discriminability (cluster-based permutation testing with optional TFCE, bootstrap representational dissimilarity), plus per-producer informational value (infoVal) with a trial-count-matched reference distribution. Works with both standard 2IFC and Brief-RC paradigms.

Companion package to rcicrdiagnostics.
